home.hero_badge: The calm practice tool for therapists
home.hero_body: Faresay brings your clients, scheduling, secure video and payments together — simple enough to run from your phone, private enough for the work you do.
home.hero_footnote: Free to start · set up in ~15 minutes · keep your own clients
home.ethos_body: We think therapists deserve better tools — and fairer terms. Faresay grows when you grow. No lock-in, no games, and no company profiting from human suffering.
home.benefits_sub: No more juggling a calendar, a payment app, a video tool and a spreadsheet. It's all here — and it's built to stay out of your way.

benefits.title: Your clients stay yours
benefits.body: You own the relationship and the record. Faresay is your tool — never a middleman between you and the people you help.

benefits.title: Genuinely simple
benefits.body: Set up in about 15 minutes — no tech skills needed. Import your client list, book a session, done. Plain-language help on every page.

benefits.title: Private by design
benefits.body: Encrypted, with UK/EU data residency and appropriate safeguards for any services outside the UK. You stay the data controller — in control of your clients' information.

benefits.title: Set your own prices
benefits.body: Your rate, your hours, even a different price per client. You keep what you charge — Faresay is a simple monthly subscription, not a cut of every session.

benefits.title: Get paid automatically
benefits.body: Clients pay by card; the money lands in your bank about two business days after each session. No chasing, no spreadsheets.

benefits.title: Runs from your phone
benefits.body: Add Faresay to your home screen and run your whole practice from a phone — no computer required.

steps.title: Add your clients
steps.body: Invite them by email or import your whole list — set up in minutes.

steps.title: Book sessions
steps.body: Pick a time — we create a private video room and email your client automatically.

steps.title: Get paid
steps.body: Connect payments once; the money arrives in your bank after each session.

home.privacy_body: Your clients trust you with the most sensitive things. We treat their information the same way — encrypted, with UK/EU data residency, and never sold or shared. You remain the data controller, in control of your records, always.
home.cta_sub: Free to begin, fair as you grow. We'll set you up personally.

footer.tagline: The simple, private way for therapists to run their practice — your clients, scheduling, secure video and payments in one place.
